title: Close FPGA timing on the critical path
description: Read the timing report, find worst-negative-slack, and fix it by pipelining/retiming/constraints instead of just lowering the clock.
body: Steps: 1. Run synthesis + place-and-route and open the timing report. 2. Identify the worst-negative-slack (WNS) path and its endpoints. 3. Decide the fix: pipeline the long combinational path, retime, restructure logic, or correct an over-tight constraint. 4. Re-run and confirm setup AND hold pass across corners. 5. Repeat until WNS >= 0. Rollback point: before adding pipeline stages that change latency. Validation: timing report shows met setup/hold at all corners; lowering Fmax to hide a real violation is not closure.
